title: Frontend developer
description:
Built and maintained the front end of a real-estate marketplace using Next.js, React, and TypeScript.
Implemented key user flows.
Extended and maintained the platform’s admin panel using React.
Contributed to frontend architecture decisions, structural patterns, and development standards.
Reviewed 5-8 pull requests weekly to ensure code quality and consistency across features.
Conducted technical interviews for frontend candidates.
Collaborated with backend and product teams to define implementation details and deliver features in a fast-paced environment.

title: Frontend developer
description:
Built the front end for a social assistance management app using React, TypeScript, and MUI.
Integrated RTK, RTK Query, and SSE for real-time updates.
Wrote component tests with Vitest & React Testing Library.
Contributed to an HRM app using Next.js, TypeScript, and Mantine UI.

title: Frontend developer
description:
Participated in the development of a CRM system using React and TypeScript, implementing FSD architecture principles.
Created a UI library based on MUI.
Refactored project structure and optimized code in accordance with SOLID, DRY, and KISS principles.
Assisted in developing the back end for a chat widget using WebSockets and MongoDB.

title: Frontend developer
description:
Developed responsive websites from Figma designs using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
Integrated layouts with WordPress, including theme development and plugin setup.
Optimized website performance with SEO.
Maintained and updated websites by fixing bugs and implementing changes.
